Official Obituary of


# Mr. James C. Drayton

1952 ~ 2020 (age 68) 68 Years Old

Be the first to offer your condolences on Mr. James's [Tribute Wall](https://www.kogersmortuarycares.com/obituary/MrJames-Drayton#tributewall)

[Share a Memory](https://www.kogersmortuarycares.com/obituary/MrJames-Drayton#twform)

Obituary & Services

Tribute Wall

## Mr. James Drayton Obituary

Mr. James C. Drayton 68, of Green Pond, SC; entered his eternal rest on  Wednesday, July 1, 2020 at his residence. His memories of life will be forever remembered by his loving wife, children and entire family.

There will be a public visitation held on Sunday: July 5, 2020 12:15 - 2:00 at the mortuary. Following the visitation the family will receive guests at the home of Mr. Drayton for fellowship and repast from 3:00-6:00 P.M.  337 Folly Creek Lane, Green Pond, SC. Services will be privately rendered.

The Family ask that you continue to keep them in your prayers as they transition through their most difficult time.

To [send flowers](https://www.kogersmortuarycares.com/obituary/MrJames-Drayton/sympathy)
to the family or [plant a tree](https://www.kogersmortuarycares.com/obituary/MrJames-Drayton/1079651/memorial-tree)
in memory of Mr. James C. Drayton, please [visit our floral store.](https://www.kogersmortuarycares.com/obituary/MrJames-Drayton/sympathy)

#### Celebrating the life of Mr. James C. Drayton

Be the first to share your favorite memory, photo or story of Mr. James. This memorial page is dedicated for family, friends and future generations to celebrate the life of their loved one.

We ask on behalf of the family that you keep your comments uplifting and appropriate to help all who come here to find comfort and healing.
